properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Cling to the Bible, though all else be taken; Lose not its precepts so precious and pure; Souls that are sleeping its tidings awaken: Life from the dead in its promises sure.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Cling to the Bible! Cling to the Bible! ClIng to the Bible! Our lamp and our guide!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Cling to the Bible! - this jewel and treasure Brings life eternal, and saves fallen man; Surely its value no mortal can measure: Seek for its blessing, 0 soul, while you can!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lamp for the feet that in by-ways have wandered, Guide for the youth that would otherwise fall; Hope for the sinner whose life has been squandered; Staff for the aged, and best Book for all!
